creator: sheldonh@iafrica.com
text:
On Mon, 29 Mar 1999 16:26:35 EST, Daniel Eischen wrote:

> I don't have access to a -current system until I get home later,
> but this port mostly builds under a 2.2.7 system (it gets way past
> blockframe.c).

Remember that the 2.2 branch isn't a concern for ports anymore. If you
can keep a port working for that branch, great. But it shouldn't be your
development platform for submissions.

Let us know what you find on your CURRENT box.

> Have you modified the Makefile in someway so that the patches don't
> get applied correctly?

Nope, used your port "out-of-the-box". :-)

Ciao,
Sheldon.
